raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the look focus on writing polish only, or on both writing polish and argumentative/logical consistency?","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general request to look at a research paragraph can reasonably include checking whether the claims and internal argument cohere.","R1.6":"Because the artifact is a paragraph and the delegation is informal, sentence- and paragraph-level readability is a central expected responsibility.","RX.1":"Any projection should preserve uncertainty about the underspecified intent of the delegation.","RX.2":"The agent must avoid inferring stronger requested responsibilities than the delegation supports.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within responsibility classification rather than reviewing or editing the paragraph.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling harmful downstream misuse by overstating content or validation responsibilities.","RX.5":"The mapping should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the artifact type."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the look focus on writing polish only, or on both writing polish and argumentative/logical consistency?

rationale.R1.2: A general request to look at a research paragraph can reasonably include checking whether the claims and internal argument cohere.
rationale.R1.6: Because the artifact is a paragraph and the delegation is informal, sentence- and paragraph-level readability is a central expected responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should preserve uncertainty about the underspecified intent of the delegation.
rationale.RX.2: The agent must avoid inferring stronger requested responsibilities than the delegation supports.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within responsibility classification rather than reviewing or editing the paragraph.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling harmful downstream misuse by overstating content or validation responsibilities.
rationale.RX.5: The mapping should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the artifact type.
